heading: Art. 120c. Other sexual misconduct
label: 920c Art. 120c. Other sexual misconduct
notes: Effective DateAmendment by effective 180 days after , and applicable with respect to offenses committed on or after such effective date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2011 Amendment note under .Pub. L. 112–81section 541(f) of Pub. L. 112–81section 843 of this titleDec. 31, 2011
amendments: Effective DateAmendment by effective 180 days after , and applicable with respect to offenses committed on or after such effective date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2011 Amendment note under .Pub. L. 112–81section 541(f) of Pub. L. 112–81section 843 of this titleDec. 31, 2011

children.heading: .—Indecent Viewing, Visual Recording, or Broadcasting
children.label: a .—Indecent Viewing, Visual Recording, or Broadcasting

children.text: knowingly and wrongfully views the private area of another person, without that other person’s consent and under circumstances in which that other person has a reasonable expectation of privacy;

knowingly photographs, videotapes, films, or records by any means the private area of another person, without that other person’s consent and under circumstances in which that other person has a reasonable expectation of privacy; or
knowingly broadcasts or distributes any such recording that the person knew or reasonably should have known was made under the circumstances proscribed in paragraphs (1) and (2);

children.heading: .—Forcible Pandering
children.label: b .—Forcible Pandering
children.text: Any person subject to this chapter who compels another person to engage in an act of prostitution with any person is guilty of forcible pandering and shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.

children.heading: .—Indecent Exposure
children.label: c .—Indecent Exposure
children.text: Any person subject to this chapter who intentionally exposes, in an indecent manner, the genitalia, anus, buttocks, or female areola or nipple is guilty of indecent exposure and shall by punished as a court-martial may direct.

children.heading: .—Act of prostitution
children.label: 1 .—Act of prostitution
children.text: The term “act of prostitution” means a sexual act or sexual contact (as defined in (article 120(g))) on account of which anything of value is given to, or received by, any person.section 920(g) of this title

children.heading: .—Private area
children.label: 2 .—Private area
children.text: The term “private area” means the naked or underwear-clad genitalia, anus, buttocks, or female areola or nipple.

children.label: A
children.text: circumstances in which a reasonable person would believe that he or she could disrobe in privacy, without being concerned that an image of a private area of the person was being captured; or

children.label: B
children.text: circumstances in which a reasonable person would believe that a private area of the person would not be visible to the public.

children.heading: .—Broadcast
children.label: 4 .—Broadcast
children.text: The term “broadcast” means to electronically transmit a visual image with the intent that it be viewed by a person or persons.

children.heading: .—Distribute
children.label: 5 .—Distribute
children.text: The term “distribute” means delivering to the actual or constructive possession of another, including transmission by electronic means.

children.heading: .—Indecent manner
children.label: 6 .—Indecent manner
children.text: The term “indecent manner” means conduct that amounts to a form of immorality relating to sexual impurity which is grossly vulgar, obscene, and repugnant to common propriety, and tends to excite sexual desire or deprave morals with respect to sexual relations.
